name: Hybrid Renewable Energy Systems
description: This cluster of papers focuses on the advancements, challenges, and potential of hydrogen energy systems and technologies. It covers various aspects such as renewable energy integration, electrolysis, power-to-gas technology, sustainability, energy storage, techno-economic analysis, fuel cells, and environmental impact.

name: Power Systems and Renewable Energy
description: This cluster of papers focuses on the application of energy storage technologies, such as battery systems and pumped-storage power stations, in integrating renewable energy sources like photovoltaic and wind power into power grids. It also addresses the challenges and benefits of energy storage, including frequency regulation, grid stability, and environmental impact.
